name: Sortie DELETE → 30-day currency recompute (cross-PC visibility via polling)
method: PC-A deletes a sortie inside the 30-day window. The same SELECT (which is what PC-B's polling fetch runs every 30s) shows the count drop by exactly 1. Realtime is not in the publication so propagation is bounded by the polling cadence (30s) — verified separately in P5.
